message:
feat(runtime): implement SELECT and SWAPDB commands with multi-database support

Add SELECT and SWAPDB command handlers to the runtime, enabling
database index switching per Redis semantics. SELECT validates the
index is in [0, 16) and updates session.selected_db. SWAPDB validates
both indices and returns OK (currently a no-op in single-store mode
since all DBs share the same namespace).

Wire both commands through classify_runtime_special_command (both
hash-based and linear scan paths) so they are handled at the runtime
level before store dispatch.

Update core_connection.json conformance fixtures: change
"select_db1_error" to "select_db1_ok" and "swapdb_nonzero_error" to
"swapdb_nonzero_ok" since DB indices 0 and 1 are now valid.

Minor: fix formatting in store zincrby test assertions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
